data.title: Innovator from Idaho invents TIDE POOL DESALINATION system combining tidal energy recovery & ocean water desalination.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 24, 2025, an inventor from Rexburg, Idaho shared their innovative creation, the TIDE POOL DESALINATION. This invention combines tidal energy recovery with an ocean water desalination system. The inventor expressed the idea stemmed from a desire for environmental sustainability. The TIDE POOL DESALINATION system aims to provide a solution to producing clean water while harnessing tidal energy efficiently. This unique design signifies a step towards a more sustainable future.

DPRK leader Kim Jong Un says the ‘military brotherhood’ between his country and Russia will ‘advance non-stop.’ He spoke at a groundbreaking ceremony to honor DPRK soldiers who fought alongside Russian troops in the Kursk region.

data.title: Hubbell Inc. raises dividend rate by 8% to $5.68 per share annually ($1.42/quarter) from $5.28 ($1.32/quarter). Payable on Dec 15, 2025.
data.description: In Shelton, CT on October 24, 2025, Hubbell Incorporated (NYSE: HUBB) announced an 8% rise in its common stock dividend rate. The new yearly dividend payment will be $5.68 per share, up from the previous $5.28 per share. This translates to $1.42 per quarter, compared to the former rate of $1.32 per quarter. Shareholders of record on November 28, 2025, will receive the dividend on December 15, 2025.

NEW-CAR PRICES HIT RECORD HIGH New-car prices reached a record $50,080 in September, driven by a rush on electric vehicles (EVs) before a $7,500 federal tax credit expired. EVs averaged $58,124, pushing overall prices up. Without the incentive, prices may fall below $50,000

data.title: Disney opens Artisan Club at Cotino in Rancho Mirage, offering programs and wellness experiences. First community near Palm Springs.
data.description: A club created by Imagineer offers a range of Disney-themed activities, entertainment, and wellness programs in Rancho Mirage, California. This initiative, known as Cotino, is the inaugural Storyliving by Disney community in proximity to Palm Springs. On October 24, 2025, the club marked a significant achievement with a diverse array of offerings aimed at enriching and motivating individuals.

data.title: Duke Energy appoints Loree Elswick as president of Duke Energy Foundation in Charlotte, N.C. on Oct. 24, 2025.
data.description: In Charlotte, North Carolina, on October 24, 2025, Duke Energy revealed the selection of Loree Elswick as the president of the Duke Energy Foundation. Pepper Natonski, the senior vice president of federal affairs, stated that Loree's appointment coincides with a critical juncture for their communities. No specific information was released about the numbers or figures involved in the announcement.

data.title: Saudi Arabia online grocery delivery market to reach $4.98B by 2030, growing at 20.21% CAGR, driven by key players.
data.description: A report on the Saudi Arabia Online Grocery Delivery Market has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The market was valued at USD 1.65 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach USD 4.98 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 20.21%. The growth in the market is mainly fueled by the growing digital adoption, especially through mobile applications that streamline the grocery shopping process.

data.title: Former Texas A&M football player Chris Larkin returns to rally against ALS, attempts world record ALS Ice Bucket Challenge.
data.description: Aggieland Against ALS was established by Chris Larkin, a former Texas A&M football player, and his wife Cissy. The organization aims to rally the Texas A&M community in the battle against ALS, in collaboration with the ALS Association. This initiative was launched in College Station, Texas on October 24, 2025. Chris Larkin, who used to play as a tight end for Texas A&M, became inspired to start this movement...

data.title: Arkema gains ISCC PLUS certification for waterborne resins in Italy, reducing PCF up to 100% at the Boretto site.
data.description: In Paris on October 24, 2025, Arkema, an expert in specialty materials, disclosed that they have obtained ISCC PLUS certification for their waterborne acrylic resins produced in Boretto, Italy. This achievement aligns with Arkema's worldwide Mass Balance roadmap. The reduction in Product Carbon Footprint (PCF) at the site reaches a maximum of 100%.

data.title: Inventor creates GPS Life Jacket to improve locating in water emergencies. Made in New Iberia, LA.
data.description: A resident of New Iberia, Louisiana, expressed his motivation to develop a high-quality life jacket aimed at increasing the likelihood of rescue during water emergencies. The innovative product, known as the GPS Life Jacket, was designed to not only keep individuals afloat but also enhance their visibility for potential rescuers. The inventor's goal was to create a reliable safety option that integrates GPS technology, ensuring precise tracking in case of emergencies. This new invention is expected to significantly improve safety measures for water activities.
